    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="en">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Carnatic Single Raga Studio</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;600&family=Cinzel:wght@400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
    :root {
    --navy: #0D1F3C;
    --navy-light: #142a50;
    --gold: #B8860B;
    --gold-light: #d4a017;
    --bg: #080e1a;
    --surface: #0d1525;
    --surface2: #111d30;
    --border: rgba(184,134,11,0.18);
    --text: #ddd5c4;
    --text-dim: #7a7060;
    --text-muted: #3a3428;
    --green: #4caf7d;
    --red: #e06060;
    --staff-bg: #edede8;
    --staff-line: #1a1a1a;
    --note-col: #111;
    --lyr-col: #555;
    --absent-col: #bbb;
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    }
    /* ── Header ── */
    .header {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--navy) 0%, var(--bg) 100%);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 14px 28px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .header-title { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 14px; }
    .header-title .glyph { font-size: 22px; color: var(--gold); }
    .header-title h1 { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--text); }
    .header-title .sub { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px; color: var(--text-dim); letter-spacing: 3px; }
    .header-swaras { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted); letter-spacing: 3px; }
    /* ── Tabs ── */
    .tabs {
    background: var(--surface);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0 28px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    gap: 0;
    }
    .tab-btn {
    background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--text-dim); padding: 10px 18px;
    border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    }
    .tab-btn:hover { color: var(--text); }
    .tab-btn.active { color: var(--gold); border-bottom-color: var(--gold); }
    .status-bar {
    margin-left: auto; font-size: 11px; color: var(--gold);
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s;
    }
    .status-bar.visible { opacity: 1; }
    /* ── Layout ── */
    .main { display: flex; flex: 1; min-height: 0; overflow: hidden; }
    .panel { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; }
    .panel-left { width: 48%; border-right: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .panel-right { flex: 1; }
    .panel-header {
    padding: 9px 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-shrink: 0;
    background: var(--surface);
    }
    .panel-label {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--gold);
    }
    .panel-info { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .panel-body { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 14px 18px; }
    /* ── Editor ── */
    #song-editor {
    flex: 1; background: #050a12; color: #a8c4e8;
    border: none; outline: none; resize: none;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;
    line-height: 1.7; padding: 14px 18px;
    min-height: 280px;
    }
    /* ── Buttons ── */
    .btn {
    background: var(--surface2); color: var(--text);
    border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 3px;
    padding: 7px 14px; cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif; font-size: 12px;
    transition: all 0.18s; white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .btn:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }
    .btn.active { background: var(--gold); color: var(--bg); border-color: var(--gold); }
    .btn.primary { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }
    .btn.danger { border-color: #e0606033; color: var(--red); }
    .btn:disabled { opacity: 0.35; cursor: default; }
    .btn-label { font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1px; font-size: 11px; display: block; }
    .btn-sub { font-size: 9px; opacity: 0.6; display: block; margin-top: 1px; }
    /* ── Mode bar ── */
    .mode-bar { padding: 12px 18px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--surface); flex-shrink: 0; }
    .mode-bar-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px; color: var(--text-muted); letter-spacing: 2px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .mode-btns { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 7px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .line-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
    .line-input {
    width: 50px; background: #050a12; color: #a8c4e8;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 3px;
    padding: 4px 7px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px;
    }
    .line-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--gold); }
    /* ── Output area ── */
    .output-placeholder {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
    justify-content: center; height: 100%; color: var(--text-muted);
    text-align: center; gap: 14px;
    }
    .output-placeholder .big-glyph { font-size: 48px; color: rgba(184,134,11,0.1); }
    .output-placeholder p { font-size: 12px; color: #2a2520; line-height: 2; }
    .output-section { margin-bottom: 20px; }
    .output-label {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 7px;
    }
    .output-img { width: 100%; image-rendering: crisp-edges; display: block; }
    .download-link {
    display: inline-block; margin-top: 7px; font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--gold); text-decoration: none; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    }
    .download-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
    .text-output {
    background: #050a12; color: #9ab5d0; padding: 14px;
    border-radius: 3px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10.5px; line-height: 1.85; white-space: pre-wrap;
    word-break: break-word; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .raga-info-bar {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border); background: #050a12;
    padding: 7px 18px; font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-muted);
    display: flex; gap: 18px; flex-wrap: wrap; flex-shrink: 0;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    }
    .raga-info-bar .rn { color: var(--gold); }
    /* ── Songbook / Ragabook ── */
    .sb-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 260px 1fr; flex: 1; min-height: 0; overflow: hidden; }
    .sb-list { border-right: 1px solid var(--border); overflow-y: auto; background: var(--surface); }
    .sb-list-header { padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px; color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: 2px; }
    .sb-item {
    padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(184,134,11,0.07);
    cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s;
    }
    .sb-item:hover, .sb-item.selected { background: var(--navy-light); }
    .sb-item-title { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 2px; }
    .sb-item-meta { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-dim); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; }
    .sb-item-stored { font-size: 9px; color: var(--gold); }
    .sb-item-unstored { font-size: 9px; color: var(--text-muted); }
    .sb-detail { overflow-y: auto; padding: 20px 24px; }
    .sb-detail h2 { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .sb-detail .meta { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-dim); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .sb-detail .context { font-size: 12px; color: #6a6050; line-height: 1.9; margin-bottom: 16px; font-style: italic; }
    .btn-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .raga-card {
    background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 3px; padding: 14px; transition: border-color 0.2s;
    }
    .raga-card:hover { border-color: var(--gold); }
    .raga-card h3 { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .raga-card .scale { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-dim); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; line-height: 2; }
    .raga-card .desc { font-size: 11px; color: #4a4538; margin-top: 7px; line-height: 1.7; font-style: italic; }
    .raga-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; }
    .empty-msg { padding: 20px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 2; }
    .parse-ok { color: var(--green); font-size: 10px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; }
    .parse-err { color: var(--red); font-size: 10px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; }
    .loading-dot { color: var(--gold); animation: pulse 1s infinite; }
    @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.3} }
    .divider { color: var(--text-muted); }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #2a2010; border-radius: 2px; }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <!-- ── Header ───────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <header class="header">
    <div class="header-title">
    <span class="glyph">♩</span>
    <h1>Carnatic Single Raga</h1>
    <span class="sub">NOTATION STUDIO</span>
    </div>
    <div class="header-swaras">S &nbsp; R &nbsp; G &nbsp; M &nbsp; P &nbsp; D &nbsp; N &nbsp; Ṡ</div>
    </header>
    <!-- ── Tabs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="tabs">
    <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="switchTab('editor')">✎ EDITOR</button>
    <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('songbook')" id="tab-songbook">📖 SONGBOOK</button>
    <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('ragabook')" id="tab-ragabook">🎼 RAGABOOK</button>
    <div class="status-bar" id="status"></div>
    </div>
    <!-- ── EDITOR TAB ─────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="tab-editor" class="main">
    <!-- Left: editor -->
    <div class="panel panel-left">
    <div class="panel-header">
    <span class="panel-label">SONG JSON</span>
    <span id="parse-indicator" class="panel-info">—</span>
    <button class="btn primary" style="margin-left:auto;font-size:11px;padding:5px 12px" onclick="saveSong()">💾 Save</button>
    </div>
    <textarea id="song-editor" spellcheck="false" oninput="onEditorChange()"></textarea>
    <!-- Mode bar -->
    <div class="mode-bar">
    <div class="mode-bar-label">OUTPUT MODE</div>
    <div class="mode-btns">
    <button class="btn" id="btn-TEXT" onclick="doText()">
    <span class="btn-label">TEXT</span>
    <span class="btn-sub">AI document</span>
    </button>
    <button class="btn" id="btn-RAGA" onclick="doRaga()">
    <span class="btn-label">RAGA</span>
    <span class="btn-sub">Staff + store</span>
    </button>
    <button class="btn" id="btn-SONG" onclick="doSong()">
    <span class="btn-label">SONG</span>
    <span class="btn-sub">All lines</span>
    </button>
    <button class="btn" id="btn-FULL" onclick="doFull()">
    <span class="btn-label">FULL</span>
    <span class="btn-sub">Raga + all lines</span>
    </button>
    </div>
    <div class="line-row">
    <button class="btn" id="btn-LINE" onclick="doLine()">
    <span class="btn-label">LINE</span>
    <span class="btn-sub">single avartanam</span>
    </button>
    <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)">Line</span>
    <input class="line-input" type="number" id="line-num" value="1" min="1">
    <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted)" id="line-total">/ —</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Right: output -->
    <div class="panel panel-right">
    <div class="panel-header">
    <span class="panel-label" id="output-mode-label">OUTPUT</span>
    <span class="panel-info" id="output-song-label"></span>
    <span class="loading-dot" id="loading-indicator" style="display:none;margin-left:auto">◌ rendering…</span>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-body" id="output-body">
    <div class="output-placeholder">
    <div class="big-glyph">♩</div>
    <p>
    Edit your song definition on the left,<br>
    then choose an output mode.<br><br>
    RAGA — renders and stores the raga permanently<br>
    SONG — every avartanam line as a PNG<br>
    FULL — raga + all lines together<br>
    TEXT — AI notation document<br>
    LINE N — single avartanam graphic
    </p>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="raga-info-bar" id="raga-info-bar" style="display:none">
    <span class="rn" id="info-raga"></span>
    <span id="info-aro"></span>
    <span id="info-ava"></span>
    <span id="info-absent"></span>
    <span class="divider">|</span>
    <span id="info-tala"></span>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ── SONGBOOK TAB ─────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="tab-songbook" class="main" style="display:none">
    <div class="sb-grid" style="flex:1;min-height:0;overflow:hidden">
    <div class="sb-list">
    <div class="sb-list-header">SAVED SONGS</div>
    <div id="sb-songs-list"><div class="empty-msg">No songs saved yet.<br>Use the Editor to compose,<br>then click Save.</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-detail" id="sb-detail">
    <div style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:12px;margin-top:40px;text-align:center">Select a song from the list</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ── RAGABOOK TAB ─────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="tab-ragabook" class="main" style="display:none">
    <div class="sb-grid" style="flex:1;min-height:0;overflow:hidden">
    <div class="sb-list">
    <div class="sb-list-header">RAGAS</div>
    <div id="rb-raga-list"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-detail" id="rb-detail">
    <div style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:12px;margin-top:40px;text-align:center">
    Select a raga to view its stored staff graphic,<br>or click Render &amp; Store on any raga card.
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <script>
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // MUSIC THEORY
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    const POSITION_MAP = {
    "D,":0,"N,":1,
    "S":2,"R":3,"G":4,"M":5,"P":6,"D":7,"N":8,
    "S'":9,"R'":10,"G'":11,"M'":12,"P'":13,
    "R1":3,"R2":3,"G2":4,"G3":4,"M1":5,"M2":5,
    "D1":7,"D2":7,"N2":8,"N3":8,
    "R1'":10,"R2'":10,"G2'":11,"G3'":11,
    };
    const LINES_AT = [0,2,4,6,8,10,12];
    const LINE_LABELS = {0:"D",2:"S",4:"G",6:"P",8:"N",10:"R",12:"M"};
    const TALA_DB = {
    Adi: {total:8, bar:new Set([4,6]), label:"Adi Talam (8: 4+2+2)"},
    Rupaka: {total:6, bar:new Set([2]), label:"Rupaka Talam (6: 2+4)"},
    Tisra_Triputa: {total:7, bar:new Set([3,5]), label:"Thisra Jati Triputa (7: 3+2+2)"},
    Dhruva: {total:14, bar:new Set([4,6,10]), label:"Dhruva Talam (14: 4+2+4+4)"},
    Matya: {total:10, bar:new Set([4,6]), label:"Matya Talam (10: 4+2+4)"},
    Jhampa: {total:10, bar:new Set([7,8]), label:"Jhampa Talam (10: 7+1+2)"},
    Ata: {total:14, bar:new Set([5,10,12]),label:"Ata Talam (14: 5+5+2+2)"},
    Eka: {total:4, bar:new Set([]), label:"Eka Talam (4)"},
    };
    const RAGA_DB = {
    Mayamalavagowla: {
    mel:15,parent:"Mayamalavagowla",jati:"Sampurna-Sampurna",
    aro:["S","R1","G3","M1","P","D1","N3","S'"],ava:["S'","N3","D1","P","M1","G3","R1","S"],
    jiva:["S","P"],absent:[],rasa:"Bhakti, Shanta",
    desc:"The 15th melakarta. The foundational teaching raga of Carnatic music — all early exercises begin here."
    },
    Malahari: {
    mel:15,parent:"Mayamalavagowla",jati:"Audava-Audava",
    aro:["S","R1","M1","P","D1","S'"],ava:["S'","D1","P","M1","G3","R1","S"],
    jiva:["R1","M1","D1"],absent:["G","N"],rasa:"Bhakti, Shanta",
    desc:"Gentle janyam of Mayamalavagowla omitting G and N in ascent. The traditional geetham raga — calm and devotional."
    },
    Mohanam: {
    mel:28,parent:"Harikambhoji",jati:"Audava-Audava",
    aro:["S","R2","G3","P","D2","S'"],ava:["S'","D2","P","G3","R2","S"],
    jiva:["G3","P","D2"],absent:["M","N"],rasa:"Shanta, Madhura",
    desc:"Pentatonic raga of great sweetness. Omits M and N. Geetham 6 Vara Veena Mrudupani is set here."
    },
    Kalyani: {
    mel:65,parent:"Mechakalyani",jati:"Sampurna-Sampurna",
    aro:["S","R2","G3","M2","P","D2","N3","S'"],ava:["S'","N3","D2","P","M2","G3","R2","S"],
    jiva:["M2","G3","N3"],absent:[],rasa:"Shringara, Veera",
    desc:"65th melakarta using prathi madhyamam (M2). Bright, majestic, and expansive."
    },
    Bilahari: {
    mel:29,parent:"Sankarabharanam",jati:"Audava-Sampurna",
    aro:["S","R2","G3","P","D2","S'"],ava:["S'","N3","D2","P","M1","G3","R2","S"],
    jiva:["R2","G3","D2"],absent:[],rasa:"Shringara",
    desc:"Vivid, joyful raga. Asymmetric — pentatonic ascent, sampurna descent. Full of life."
    },
    Kamboji: {
    mel:28,parent:"Harikambhoji",jati:"Shadava-Sampurna",
    aro:["S","R2","G3","M1","P","D2","S'"],ava:["S'","N3","D2","P","M1","G3","R2","S"],
    jiva:["G3","P","D2"],absent:[],rasa:"Shringara, Veera",
    desc:"Six-note ascent omitting N, full descent. Majestic and expansive in character."
    },
    Shankarabharanam: {
    mel:29,parent:"Sankarabharanam",jati:"Sampurna-Sampurna",
    aro:["S","R2","G3","M1","P","D2","N3","S'"],ava:["S'","N3","D2","P","M1","G3","R2","S"],
    jiva:["S","M1","P"],absent:[],rasa:"Veera, Shanta",
    desc:"29th melakarta, equivalent to the Western major scale. Grand and dignified."
    },
    Bhairavi: {
    mel:20,parent:"Natabhairavi",jati:"Sampurna-Sampurna",
    aro:["S","R1","G2","M1","P","D1","N2","S'"],ava:["S'","N2","D1","P","M1","G2","R1","S"],
    jiva:["G2","N2"],absent:[],rasa:"Karuna, Shringara",
    desc:"20th melakarta. Uses all flat variants. Deeply devotional and expressive."
    },
    Hamsadhwani: {
    mel:29,parent:"Sankarabharanam",jati:"Audava-Audava",
    aro:["S","R2","G3","P","N3","S'"],ava:["S'","N3","P","G3","R2","S"],
    jiva:["G3","N3"],absent:["M","D"],rasa:"Shanta, Madhura",
    desc:"Pentatonic janyam omitting M and D. Bright and popular in concert programmes."
    },
    Hindolam: {
    mel:20,parent:"Natabhairavi",jati:"Audava-Audava",
    aro:["S","G2","M1","D1","N2","S'"],ava:["S'","N2","D1","M1","G2","S"],
    jiva:["G2","D1"],absent:["R","P"],rasa:"Shringara, Karuna",
    desc:"Pentatonic omitting R and P. Deeply meditative and introspective."
    },
    Suddha_Saveri: {
    mel:29,parent:"Sankarabharanam",jati:"Audava-Audava",
    aro:["S","R2","M1","P","D2","S'"],ava:["S'","D2","P","M1","R2","S"],
    jiva:["R2","M1","D2"],absent:["G","N"],rasa:"Shanta, Karuna",
    desc:"Pentatonic omitting G and N. Calm and devotional."
    },
    };
    function cleanSwara(s) {
    if (!s) return s;
    if (s.endsWith("'")) return s.replace(/[0-9]/g,"").slice(0,-1)+"'";
    if (s.endsWith(",")) return s.replace(/[0-9]/g,"").slice(0,-1)+",";
    return s.replace(/[0-9]/g,"");
    }
    function getSwaraInfo(raw) {
    raw = (raw||"").trim();
    if (raw==="-"||raw==="") return {kind:"rest",letter:"",octave:null,pos:2};
    let kind = "note";
    if (raw.endsWith(".")) { kind="hold"; raw=raw.slice(0,-1); }
    let base=raw, octave=null;
    if (base.endsWith("'")) { base=base.slice(0,-1); octave="above"; }
    else if (base.endsWith(",")) { base=base.slice(0,-1); octave="below"; }
    const letter = base.replace(/[0-9]/g,"");
    const pos = POSITION_MAP[raw] ?? POSITION_MAP[base] ?? POSITION_MAP[letter] ?? 2;
    return {kind, letter, octave, pos};
    }
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // CANVAS RENDERER
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    const SCALE=2, HALF=5, STAFF_H=60, NABV=14, NLBL=12, ROW_H=NABV+STAFF_H+NLBL, NOTE_R=4;
    const pt = v => v * SCALE;
    function drawStaffFrame(ctx, x0, sbot, sw, absent, showLabels) {
    const stop = sbot - pt(STAFF_H);
    ctx.fillStyle = "#edede8"; ctx.fillRect(x0, stop, sw, pt(STAFF_H));
    ctx.strokeStyle="#1a1a1a"; ctx.lineWidth=pt(0.65);
    for (const lp of LINES_AT) {
    const y=sbot-pt(lp*HALF);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x0,y); ctx.lineTo(x0+sw,y); ctx.stroke();
    }
    ctx.strokeStyle="#111"; ctx.lineWidth=pt(1.8);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x0,stop); ctx.lineTo(x0,sbot); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.lineWidth=pt(0.7);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x0+pt(3),stop); ctx.lineTo(x0+pt(3),sbot); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.lineWidth=pt(1.8);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x0+sw,stop); ctx.lineTo(x0+sw,sbot); ctx.stroke();
    if (showLabels) {
    for (const [posStr,name] of Object.entries(LINE_LABELS)) {
    const pos=parseInt(posStr), y=sbot-pt(pos*HALF);
    const grey=absent.some(a=>cleanSwara(a).replace(/[',]/g,"")===name.replace(/[',]/g,""));
    ctx.font=`bold ${pt(6)}px monospace`;
    ctx.fillStyle=grey?"#bbbbbb":"#222222";
    const tw=ctx.measureText(name).width;
    ctx.fillText(name, x0-tw-pt(4), y+pt(3));
    }
    }
    }
    function drawNoteHead(ctx, cx, cy, kind, letter, octave) {
    const r=pt(NOTE_R);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,0,Math.PI*2);
    if (kind==="note") { ctx.fillStyle="#111"; ctx.fill(); }
    else { ctx.fillStyle="#fff"; ctx.strokeStyle="#111"; ctx.lineWidth=pt(1.5); ctx.fill(); ctx.stroke(); }
    if (octave==="above") {
    ctx.fillStyle="#111"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy-r-pt(3),pt(1.3),0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
    } else if (octave==="below") {
    ctx.fillStyle="#111"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx,cy+r+pt(3),pt(1.3),0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
    }
    if (kind==="note") {
    ctx.font=`bold ${pt(9)}px monospace`; ctx.fillStyle="#111";
    const tw=ctx.measureText(letter).width;
    ctx.fillText(letter, cx-tw/2, cy-r-pt(3));
    }
    }
    function renderLine(lineData, tala, raga, opts={}) {
    const {showLabels=true, sectionName=null, widthPts=500} = opts;
    const absent=raga.absent||[], total=tala.total, barAfter=tala.bar;
    const swaras=lineData.swaras||[], words=lineData.words||[], N=swaras.length;
    const secH=sectionName?pt(16):0;
    const labelW=showLabels?pt(44):pt(18);
    const imgW=labelW+pt(widthPts), imgH=secH+pt(ROW_H);
    const c=document.createElement("canvas"); c.width=imgW; c.height=imgH;
    const ctx=c.getContext("2d");
    ctx.fillStyle="#faf8f0"; ctx.fillRect(0,0,imgW,imgH);
    if (sectionName) {
    ctx.font=`bold ${pt(9)}px 'EB Garamond',Georgia,serif`;
    ctx.fillStyle="#0D1F3C"; ctx.fillText(sectionName, labelW, pt(10));
    ctx.strokeStyle="#B8860B"; ctx.lineWidth=pt(0.7);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(labelW,pt(13)); ctx.lineTo(labelW+pt(100),pt(13)); ctx.stroke();
    }
    const sbot=imgH-pt(NLBL), x0=labelW, sw=imgW-x0;
    drawStaffFrame(ctx,x0,sbot,sw,absent,showLabels);
    const noteW=sw/N;
    // barlines
    for (let i=1;i<=N;i++) {
    const x=x0+i*noteW, pos=i%total;
    if (i%total===0&&i<N) {
    ctx.strokeStyle="#444"; ctx.lineWidth=pt(1.5);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x,sbot-pt(STAFF_H)); ctx.lineTo(x,sbot); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.lineWidth=pt(0.5);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x-pt(3),sbot-pt(STAFF_H)); ctx.lineTo(x-pt(3),sbot); ctx.stroke();
    } else if (barAfter.has(pos)) {
    ctx.strokeStyle="#444"; ctx.lineWidth=pt(0.7);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x,sbot-pt(STAFF_H)); ctx.lineTo(x,sbot); ctx.stroke();
    }
    }
    // notes
    for (let i=0;i<N;i++) {
    const {kind,letter,octave,pos}=getSwaraInfo(swaras[i]);
    const cx=x0+i*noteW+noteW*0.5;
    if (kind==="rest") {
    ctx.strokeStyle="#bbb"; ctx.lineWidth=pt(0.8);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx-pt(3),sbot-pt(STAFF_H/2)); ctx.lineTo(cx+pt(3),sbot-pt(STAFF_H/2)); ctx.stroke();
    } else {
    const cy=sbot-pt(pos*HALF);
    drawNoteHead(ctx,cx,cy,kind,letter,octave);
    }
    const w=words[i];
    if (w&&w!=="-") {
    ctx.font=`${pt(7)}px 'EB Garamond',Georgia,serif`;
    ctx.fillStyle="#555";
    const tw=ctx.measureText(w).width;
    ctx.fillText(w,cx-tw/2,sbot+pt(9));
    }
    }
    return c;
    }
    function renderRagaCanvas(raga, ragaName, widthPts=500) {
    const labelW=pt(44), imgW=labelW+pt(widthPts);
    const hdrH=pt(26), lblH=pt(14), rowH=pt(ROW_H), sep=pt(10);
    const imgH=hdrH+lblH+rowH+sep+lblH+rowH+pt(6);
    const c=document.createElement("canvas"); c.width=imgW; c.height=imgH;
    const ctx=c.getContext("2d");
    ctx.fillStyle="#faf8f0"; ctx.fillRect(0,0,imgW,imgH);
    ctx.font=`bold ${pt(11)}px 'Cinzel','EB Garamond',Georgia,serif`;
    ctx.fillStyle="#0D1F3C";
    ctx.fillText(`${ragaName.replace("_"," ")} — Ārohanam & Āvarohanam`, labelW, pt(17));
    ctx.strokeStyle="#B8860B"; ctx.lineWidth=pt(0.8);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(labelW,hdrH-pt(2)); ctx.lineTo(imgW-pt(4),hdrH-pt(2)); ctx.stroke();
    function drawScale(notes, yTop, rowLabel) {
    ctx.font=`bold ${pt(8)}px 'EB Garamond',Georgia,serif`;
    ctx.fillStyle="#0D1F3C"; ctx.fillText(rowLabel,labelW,yTop+pt(10));
    const sbot=yTop+lblH+rowH-pt(NLBL), x0=labelW, sw=imgW-x0;
    drawStaffFrame(ctx,x0,sbot,sw,raga.absent||[],true);
    const N=notes.length, noteW=sw/(N+1);
    for (let i=0;i<N;i++) {
    const {letter,octave,pos}=getSwaraInfo(notes[i]);
    const cx=x0+(i+1)*noteW, cy=sbot-pt(pos*HALF);
    drawNoteHead(ctx,cx,cy,"note",letter,octave);
    }
    }
    drawScale(raga.aro, hdrH, "Ārohanam (ascending)");
    drawScale(raga.ava, hdrH+lblH+rowH+sep, "Āvarohanam (descending)");
    return c;
    }
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // STORAGE (localStorage — works offline, persists forever)
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    const LS = {
    get(key) { try{const v=localStorage.getItem(key);return v?JSON.parse(v):null;}catch{return null;} },
    set(key,v) { try{localStorage.setItem(key,JSON.stringify(v));}catch(e){console.warn("Storage full",e);} },
    del(key) { try{localStorage.removeItem(key);}catch{} },
    keys(prefix){ try{return Object.keys(localStorage).filter(k=>k.startsWith(prefix));}catch{return[];} },
    };
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // STATE
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    let currentSong = null;
    let currentMode = null;
    const DEFAULT_SONG = {
    title:"Sree Gana Natha", raga:"Malahari", tala:"Tisra_Triputa",
    composer:"Purandara Dasa", language:"Kannada",
    context:"First geetham in the Carnatic curriculum, composed by Purandara Dasa (1484–1564), the father of Carnatic music. Set in Malahari Ragam — a janyam of Mayamalavagowla omitting G and N in ascent — and Thisra Jati Triputa Thalam (3+2+2 = 7 beats). Praises Lord Ganesha.",
    sections:[
    {name:"Pallavi",lines:[
    {swaras:["R","S","D,","S","S.","S","S."],words:["Pa","du","ma","na","-","bhā","-"]},
    {swaras:["M","G","R","M","M","P","P."], words:["pa","ra","ma","pu","ru","shā","-"]},
    {swaras:["S","D","D.","D","P","M","P"], words:["Pa","ram","-","jō","-","-","thi"]},
    {swaras:["D","D","P","M","G","R","S"], words:["swa","rū","-","pā","-","-","-"]},
    ]},
    {name:"Anupallavi",lines:[
    {swaras:["P","M","P","D","S'","D","S'"], words:["U","dha","dhi","ni","vā","-","sa"]},
    {swaras:["R'","S'","D","D","S'","D","P"],words:["u","ra","ga","śa","ya","-","na"]},
    {swaras:["D","D","P","P","P.","P","M"], words:["u","-","nna","thō","-","nna","tha"]},
    {swaras:["P","P.","P","M","G","R","S"], words:["Rā","-","ma","nā","-","-","ma"]},
    ]},
    ]
    };
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // DOWNLOAD HELPER (reliable blob-based download)
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    function downloadPNG(canvas, filename) {
    canvas.toBlob(blob => {
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = url; a.download = filename;
    document.body.appendChild(a); a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
    setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
    }, "image/png");
    }
    function downloadText(text, filename) {
    const blob = new Blob([text], {type:"text/plain"});
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href=url; a.download=filename;
    document.body.appendChild(a); a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
    setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(url),1000);
    }
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // OUTPUT RENDERING HELPERS
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    function clearOutput() {
    document.getElementById("output-body").innerHTML = "";
    }
    function addOutputSection(label, canvas, filename) {
    const div = document.createElement("div");
    div.className = "output-section";
    const lbl = document.createElement("div");
    lbl.className = "output-label"; lbl.textContent = label;
    div.appendChild(lbl);
    // Show image
    const img = document.createElement("img");
    img.className = "output-img";
    img.src = canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
    div.appendChild(img);
    // Download button
    const btn = document.createElement("button");
    btn.className = "btn"; btn.style.marginTop="7px"; btn.style.fontSize="11px";
    btn.innerHTML = `↓ Download ${filename}`;
    btn.onclick = () => downloadPNG(canvas, filename);
    div.appendChild(btn);
    document.getElementById("output-body").appendChild(div);
    }
    function addTextSection(label, text, filename) {
    const div = document.createElement("div");
    div.className = "output-section";
    const lbl = document.createElement("div");
    lbl.className = "output-label"; lbl.textContent = label;
    div.appendChild(lbl);
    const pre = document.createElement("pre");
    pre.className = "text-output"; pre.textContent = text;
    div.appendChild(pre);
    const btn = document.createElement("button");
    btn.className = "btn"; btn.style.marginTop="7px"; btn.style.fontSize="11px";
    btn.innerHTML = `↓ Download ${filename}`;
    btn.onclick = () => downloadText(text, filename);
    div.appendChild(btn);
    document.getElementById("output-body").appendChild(div);
    }
    function setMode(mode) {
    currentMode = mode;
    document.querySelectorAll(".mode-btns .btn, .line-row .btn").forEach(b=>{
    b.classList.remove("active");
    if (b.id==="btn-"+mode) b.classList.add("active");
    });
    document.getElementById("output-mode-label").textContent = mode;
    if (currentSong) document.getElementById("output-song-label").textContent = `${currentSong.title} — ${currentSong.raga}`;
    }
    function setLoading(on) {
    document.getElementById("loading-indicator").style.display = on?"inline":"none";
    }
    function getAllLines() {
    if (!currentSong) return [];
    const lines = [];
    for (const sec of (currentSong.sections||[])) {
    for (let i=0;i<sec.lines.length;i++) {
    lines.push({secName:i===0?sec.name:null, line:sec.lines[i]});
    }
    }
    return lines;
    }
    function safeFilename(s) {
    return s.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g,"_");
    }
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // MODE HANDLERS
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    function doRaga() {
    if (!currentSong) return;
    const rd = RAGA_DB[currentSong.raga];
    if (!rd) { showStatus("⚠ Raga not found: "+currentSong.raga); return; }
    setMode("RAGA"); clearOutput();
    const canvas = renderRagaCanvas(rd, currentSong.raga);
    addOutputSection(`RAGA — ${currentSong.raga}`, canvas, `${safeFilename(currentSong.raga)}_raga.png`);
    // Store in ragabook
    storeRaga(currentSong.raga, rd, canvas);
    showStatus(`✓ ${currentSong.raga} stored in Ragabook`);
    }
    function doLine() {
    if (!currentSong) return;
    const rd=RAGA_DB[currentSong.raga], td=TALA_DB[currentSong.tala];
    if (!rd||!td) return;
    const lines=getAllLines();
    const n=parseInt(document.getElementById("line-num").value)||1;
    const idx=n-1;
    if (idx<0||idx>=lines.length) { showStatus("⚠ Line "+n+" out of range"); return; }
    setMode("LINE"); clearOutput();
    const {secName,line}=lines[idx];
    const canvas=renderLine(line,td,rd,{showLabels:idx===0,sectionName:secName});
    addOutputSection(`LINE ${n}${secName?" — "+secName:""}`, canvas, `${safeFilename(currentSong.title)}_line_${String(n).padStart(3,"0")}.png`);
    }
    function doSong() {
    if (!currentSong) return;
    const rd=RAGA_DB[currentSong.raga], td=TALA_DB[currentSong.tala];
    if (!rd||!td) return;
    setMode("SONG"); clearOutput();
    const lines=getAllLines();
    lines.forEach(({secName,line},idx)=>{
    const canvas=renderLine(line,td,rd,{showLabels:idx===0,sectionName:secName});
    const label=`Line ${idx+1}${secName?" — "+secName:""}`;
    addOutputSection(label, canvas, `${safeFilename(currentSong.title)}_line_${String(idx+1).padStart(3,"0")}.png`);
    });
    }
    function doFull() {
    if (!currentSong) return;
    const rd=RAGA_DB[currentSong.raga], td=TALA_DB[currentSong.tala];
    if (!rd||!td) return;
    setMode("FULL"); clearOutput();
    const ragaCanvas=renderRagaCanvas(rd,currentSong.raga);
    addOutputSection(`RAGA — ${currentSong.raga}`, ragaCanvas, `${safeFilename(currentSong.raga)}_raga.png`);
    storeRaga(currentSong.raga,rd,ragaCanvas);
    const lines=getAllLines();
    lines.forEach(({secName,line},idx)=>{
    const canvas=renderLine(line,td,rd,{showLabels:idx===0,sectionName:secName});
    addOutputSection(`Line ${idx+1}${secName?" — "+secName:""}`, canvas,
    `${safeFilename(currentSong.title)}_line_${String(idx+1).padStart(3,"0")}.png`);
    });
    showStatus(`✓ ${currentSong.raga} stored in Ragabook`);
    }
    async function doText() {
    if (!currentSong) return;
    setMode("TEXT"); clearOutput(); setLoading(true);
    const rd=RAGA_DB[currentSong.raga], td=TALA_DB[currentSong.tala];
    const aroStr=(rd?.aro||[]).map(cleanSwara).join(" ");
    const avaStr=(rd?.ava||[]).map(cleanSwara).join(" ");
    const absentStr=(rd?.absent||[]).map(cleanSwara).join(" ")||"none";
    const prompt=`You are a Carnatic music educator. Produce a detailed notation document for this song.
    Song: ${JSON.stringify(currentSong,null,2)}
    Raga ${currentSong.raga}: Āro: ${aroStr} | Āva: ${avaStr} | Absent: ${absentStr}${rd?.desc?" | "+rd.desc:""}
    Tala: ${td?.label||currentSong.tala}
    Write a document with:
    1. Title and metadata
    2. Raga description and tala explanation
    3. Expanded context (musical/historical, 2-3 paragraphs)
    4. Notation key (S R G M P D N, S' for tara, S, for mandra, P, for hold, - for rest, | anga, || avartanam)
    5. Each section with swaras notation (using | and || barlines) and sahitya (words) below each line
    Keep it educational and clear. Use our notation format throughout.`;
    const pre=document.createElement("pre");
    pre.className="text-output"; pre.style.minHeight="200px";
    const sec=document.createElement("div"); sec.className="output-section";
    const lbl=document.createElement("div"); lbl.className="output-label"; lbl.textContent="TEXT — AI Notation Document";
    sec.appendChild(lbl); sec.appendChild(pre);
    document.getElementById("output-body").appendChild(sec);
    try {
    const res=await fetch("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",{
    method:"POST", headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},
    body:JSON.stringify({model:"claude-sonnet-4-20250514",max_tokens:1000,
    messages:[{role:"user",content:prompt}]})
    });
    const data=await res.json();
    const text=data.content?.map(b=>b.text||"").join("\n")||"No response";
    pre.textContent=text;
    const btn=document.createElement("button");
    btn.className="btn"; btn.style.marginTop="10px"; btn.style.fontSize="11px";
    btn.innerHTML="↓ Download text file";
    btn.onclick=()=>downloadText(text, `${safeFilename(currentSong.title)}_notation.txt`);
    sec.appendChild(btn);
    } catch(e) { pre.textContent="Error: "+e.message; }
    setLoading(false);
    }
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // EDITOR / PARSE
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    function onEditorChange() {
    const val = document.getElementById("song-editor").value;
    try {
    currentSong = JSON.parse(val);
    const lines = getAllLines();
    document.getElementById("parse-indicator").innerHTML =
    `<span class="parse-ok">✓ ${currentSong.title} &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${lines.length} lines</span>`;
    document.getElementById("line-total").textContent = "/ " + lines.length;
    document.getElementById("line-num").max = lines.length;
    updateRagaInfoBar();
    // Enable buttons
    ["RAGA","SONG","FULL","LINE"].forEach(m=>document.getElementById("btn-"+m).disabled=false);
    } catch(e) {
    currentSong = null;
    document.getElementById("parse-indicator").innerHTML =
    `<span class="parse-err">⚠ ${e.message}</span>`;
    document.getElementById("raga-info-bar").style.display="none";
    ["RAGA","SONG","FULL","LINE"].forEach(m=>document.getElementById("btn-"+m).disabled=true);
    }
    }
    function updateRagaInfoBar() {
    if (!currentSong) return;
    const rd=RAGA_DB[currentSong.raga], td=TALA_DB[currentSong.tala];
    const bar=document.getElementById("raga-info-bar");
    if (!rd||!td) { bar.style.display="none"; return; }
    bar.style.display="flex";
    document.getElementById("info-raga").textContent=currentSong.raga.replace("_"," ");
    document.getElementById("info-aro").textContent="Āro: "+rd.aro.map(cleanSwara).join(" ");
    document.getElementById("info-ava").textContent="Āva: "+rd.ava.map(cleanSwara).join(" ");
    document.getElementById("info-absent").textContent="Absent: "+((rd.absent||[]).map(cleanSwara).join(" ")||"none");
    document.getElementById("info-tala").textContent=td.label;
    }
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // SONGBOOK
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    function saveSong() {
    if (!currentSong) return;
    const key="song:"+safeFilename(currentSong.title);
    LS.set(key, currentSong);
    showStatus(`✓ Saved "${currentSong.title}"`);
    refreshSongbookTab();
    }
    function refreshSongbookTab() {
    const keys=LS.keys("song:");
    const songs=keys.map(k=>({key:k,...LS.get(k)})).sort((a,b)=>a.title.localeCompare(b.title));
    const list=document.getElementById("sb-songs-list");
    list.innerHTML="";
    if (!songs.length) { list.innerHTML='<div class="empty-msg">No songs saved yet.<br>Use the Editor to compose,<br>then click Save.</div>'; return; }
    songs.forEach(s=>{
    const div=document.createElement("div");
    div.className="sb-item";
    div.innerHTML=`<div class="sb-item-title">${s.title}</div><div class="sb-item-meta">${s.raga} · ${(s.tala||"").replace("_"," ")}</div>${s.composer?'<div class="sb-item-meta">'+s.composer+'</div>':""}`;
    div.onclick=()=>showSongDetail(s);
    list.appendChild(div);
    });
    // Update tab count
    document.getElementById("tab-songbook").textContent=`📖 SONGBOOK (${songs.length})`;
    }
    function showSongDetail(s) {
    document.querySelectorAll("#sb-songs-list .sb-item").forEach(el=>{
    el.classList.toggle("selected", el.querySelector(".sb-item-title")?.textContent===s.title);
    });
    const rd=RAGA_DB[s.raga], td=TALA_DB[s.tala];
    const detail=document.getElementById("sb-detail");
    detail.innerHTML=`
    <h2>${s.title}</h2>
    <div class="meta">${s.raga}${rd?" · mel."+rd.mel:""} &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${(s.tala||"").replace("_"," ")} &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${s.composer||"Traditional"}</div>
    ${s.context?`<div class="context">${s.context}</div>`:""}
    <div class="btn-row">
    <button class="btn primary" onclick='loadIntoEditor("${s.key}")'>✎ Load into Editor</button>
    <button class="btn danger" onclick='deleteSong("${s.key}","${s.title.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}">🗑 Delete</button>
    </div>
    <div id="sb-preview"></div>
    `;
    // Render first line preview
    if (rd&&td&&s.sections?.length) {
    const firstLine=s.sections[0].lines[0];
    if (firstLine) {
    const canvas=renderLine(firstLine,td,rd,{showLabels:true,sectionName:s.sections[0].name});
    const img=document.createElement("img"); img.className="output-img";
    img.src=canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
    const lbl=document.createElement("div"); lbl.className="output-label"; lbl.style.marginBottom="6px"; lbl.textContent="First line preview";
    document.getElementById("sb-preview").appendChild(lbl);
    document.getElementById("sb-preview").appendChild(img);
    }
    }
    }
    function loadIntoEditor(key) {
    const s=LS.get(key);
    if (!s) return;
    document.getElementById("song-editor").value=JSON.stringify(s,null,2);
    onEditorChange();
    switchTab("editor");
    }
    function deleteSong(key,title) {
    if (!confirm(`Delete "${title}"?`)) return;
    LS.del(key);
    document.getElementById("sb-detail").innerHTML='<div style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:12px;margin-top:40px;text-align:center">Select a song from the list</div>';
    refreshSongbookTab();
    }
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // RAGABOOK
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    function storeRaga(ragaName, ragaData, canvas) {
    const png=canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
    LS.set("raga_png:"+ragaName, {
    ragaName, aro:ragaData.aro, ava:ragaData.ava,
    absent:ragaData.absent, storedAt:new Date().toISOString(), png
    });
    refreshRagabookTab();
    }
    function refreshRagabookTab() {
    const list=document.getElementById("rb-raga-list");
    list.innerHTML="";
    const storedKeys=LS.keys("raga_png:");
    const storedNames=new Set(storedKeys.map(k=>k.replace("raga_png:","")));
    const count=storedNames.size;
    document.getElementById("tab-ragabook").textContent=`🎼 RAGABOOK (${count})`;
    Object.keys(RAGA_DB).forEach(ragaName=>{
    const stored=storedNames.has(ragaName);
    const div=document.createElement("div"); div.className="sb-item";
    div.innerHTML=`<div class="sb-item-title">${ragaName.replace("_"," ")}</div><div class="${stored?"sb-item-stored":"sb-item-unstored"}">${stored?"✓ stored":"not yet rendered"}</div>`;
    div.onclick=()=>showRagaDetail(ragaName,stored);
    list.appendChild(div);
    });
    }
    function showRagaDetail(ragaName, stored) {
    document.querySelectorAll("#rb-raga-list .sb-item").forEach(el=>{
    el.classList.toggle("selected", el.querySelector(".sb-item-title")?.textContent===ragaName.replace("_"," "));
    });
    const rd=RAGA_DB[ragaName];
    const detail=document.getElementById("rb-detail");
    const storedData=stored?LS.get("raga_png:"+ragaName):null;
    detail.innerHTML=`
    <h2>${ragaName.replace("_"," ")}</h2>
    <div class="meta">
    Mel. ${rd.mel} &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${rd.jati} &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${rd.rasa||""}
    ${storedData?.storedAt?'&nbsp;·&nbsp; Stored: '+new Date(storedData.storedAt).toLocaleDateString():""}
    </div>
    <div class="context">${rd.desc||""}</div>
    <div class="btn-row">
    <button class="btn primary" onclick='renderAndStoreRagaFromBook("${ragaName}")'>⟳ Render &amp; Store</button>
    ${stored?`<button class="btn" onclick='downloadStoredRaga("${ragaName}")'>↓ Download PNG</button>`:""}
    </div>
    <div id="rb-img-container">
    ${stored&&storedData?.png?`<div class="output-label" style="margin-bottom:6px">RAGA — ${ragaName.replace("_"," ")}</div><img class="output-img" src="${storedData.png}" style="image-rendering:crisp-edges">`:
    '<div style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:11px;margin-top:20px">Not yet rendered. Click Render &amp; Store.</div>'}
    </div>
    `;
    }
    function renderAndStoreRagaFromBook(ragaName) {
    const rd=RAGA_DB[ragaName];
    if (!rd) return;
    const canvas=renderRagaCanvas(rd,ragaName);
    storeRaga(ragaName,rd,canvas);
    showRagaDetail(ragaName,true);
    showStatus(`✓ ${ragaName} rendered and stored`);
    View remainder of file in raw view
